description: Seven structural claims from the Snell Manuscript mapped to QA

claims.name: Seven Subdivisions x Triple = 21
claims.snell_text: seven distinct orders of triple subdivision
claims.qa_mapping: 7 x 3 = 21; septenary (crystal interior) x triune (orbit types)

witnesses.mod_9_note: singularity residue — complete hierarchy maps to dominant

claims.name: Frequency Scaling by 3 and 9
claims.snell_text: harmonic thirds 100M, enharmonic sixths 300M, diatonic ninths 900M, etheric sixths 8100M, interetheric ninths 24300M
claims.qa_mapping: scaling factors exclusively 3 and 9; mod-9 digital roots: 1->3->9->9->9

claims.name: Trexar Physical Orbit Encoding
claims.snell_text: wire composed of silver (third), gold (sixth), platinum (ninth)

claims.name: Mass = Difference of Forces = f-value
claims.snell_text: molecular weight consists in the difference between terrestrial attraction and celestial sympathetic outreach
claims.qa_mapping: f(b,e) = b*b + b*e - e*e = terrestrial(b*b+b*e) - celestial(e*e)

claims.name: Polarity Inversion at 2/3 and 1/3
claims.snell_text: repulse at 66 2/3 against 100; attract at 33 1/3 against 100

witnesses.mod3_connection: 3 residue classes: 2 in discord = repulsion, 1 in discord = attraction

claims.name: Triple Aqueous Disintegration = Orbit Descent
claims.snell_text: first thirds molecular, second sixths atomic ether, third ninths high atomic harmonic

claims.name: Rotation from 3:9 Ratio
claims.snell_text: rotation arises from harmonic interaction of dominant and enharmonic in ratio 3:9; propeller thirds 120rpm, sixths 360rpm
